title: Amethyst Mace
description: Transform your combat experience with the Amethyst Mace. A stunning, high-quality retexture that brings the mystical power of Amethyst to your Minecraft weaponry.
body:
Boried of the standard Mace look? Amethyst Mace is a sleek and vibrant texture pack designed to give your weapon a magical, crystalline upgrade. With its deep purple glow and sharp pixel-art details, your Mace will now look as powerful as it hits!

Key Features
Crystal Aesthetic: A beautiful amethyst-themed texture with glowing purple highlights.

Unique Design: Custom-made pixels that distinguish the Mace from any other tool in your inventory.

Vanilla Friendly: Fits perfectly into the Minecraft world while still standing out as a legendary item.
